tasks.title: Compile 50 investor target profiles
tasks.description: Research and organize seed-stage investors interested in AI/research tools. Profiles in Google Sheet.

tasks.title: Define investor outreach strategy
tasks.description: Decide on targeting approach — focusing on B2C-friendly seed investors where panel recruitment is an edge.

tasks.title: Draft investor outreach email sequence
tasks.description: Create personalized cold outreach emails for the 50 target investors. Include deck link, traction highlights, meeting CTA.

tasks.title: Research warm intro paths for top 10 investors
tasks.description: Map LinkedIn connections and mutual contacts for the highest-priority investor targets.

tasks.title: Build UserLabs sales deck
tasks.description: Content-first approach: nail the narrative structure (problem, solution, traction, team, ask) then design. Leverage Chris's design background for final polish.

tasks.title: Set up per-topic context system
tasks.description: Per-topic system prompts, memory files, and cross-topic awareness via topic-registry.md. Each topic loads its own context automatically.

tasks.title: Create shared business memory files
tasks.description: Built memory/shared/ with 5 cross-cutting knowledge files: chris-business-context, userlabs-product, userlabs-sales, income-strategy, network. All topics can read and update.

tasks.title: Build backup system
tasks.description: Backup script covering workspace, config, auth, cron, sessions, LaunchAgent plist. Runs 9 AM + 9 PM, keeps 14 backups. RECOVERY.md with full disaster recovery guide.

tasks.title: Fix gateway restart stability
tasks.description: Diagnosed port-race condition on restart. Bumped LaunchAgent ThrottleInterval from 1→5 seconds. Rule: never restart gateway from within agent session.

tasks.title: Build Mission Control dashboard
tasks.description: Next.js task management dashboard with topic sidebar, project tabs, kanban board, Telegram deep links, action instructions with copy-to-clipboard.

tasks.title: Set up memory search (embeddings)
tasks.description: Configured local embeddings (embeddinggemma-300m), hybrid BM25/vector search, MMR dedup, temporal decay. Was broken from day 1 — now operational with 34 files, 134 chunks indexed.

tasks.title: Configure Telegram group sender allowlist
tasks.description: Security gap flagged by openclaw status — group commands have no sender allowlist. Needs Chris to configure.
tasks.actionInstructions:
This is a security issue flagged by `openclaw status`. Any group member can currently invoke commands.

To fix, run:
```
openclaw config set channels.telegram.groupAllowFrom '["8534200023"]'
openclaw gateway restart
```
This restricts group commands to just your Telegram user ID.

tasks.title: Build Nolan's Goal Rush v1
tasks.description: HTML5 Canvas soccer game — side-scroller with penalty shootout boss fights. Character: Nolan with M haircut, pink Inter Miami jersey. Deploy to Vercel.

tasks.title: Wire topic agents to tasks.json
tasks.description: Update topic system prompts to use tasks.sh for task management instead of ad-hoc task-queue.md

tasks.title: Overnight research: 100+ YouTube transcripts → 15 viable passive business ideas
tasks.description: Pull 100+ transcripts from micro-SaaS/indie hacker/AI automation channels. Extract ideas, build evaluation framework, score and refine to 15 highly viable trend-based businesses Jean Clawd can run.

tasks.title: CRM: Vercel Postgres + API routes
tasks.description: Vercel Postgres DB, migrations, CRUD API routes, auth token for JC writes.

tasks.title: CRM: Import 48 real contacts + 57 Granola meetings
tasks.description: Pulled contacts from Chris's calendar/Granola, imported with meeting history, set pipeline stages.

tasks.title: CRM: Contact enrichment via Brave Search
tasks.description: V2: Structured enrichment with mini-resume person profiles, deep company descriptions, meeting-grounded pilot opportunities ([FROM MEETING] vs [HYPOTHESIS] labels), and actionable next steps. Pipes Granola meeting data into Claude synthesis.

tasks.title: CRM: Auto-generated next steps per contact
tasks.description: Templated suggested next steps based on pipeline stage + meeting context. Building now.

tasks.title: CRM: Calendar sync cron
tasks.description: Auto-sync Chris's calendar to CRM. Detect new meetings, update contacts, trigger enrichment.

tasks.title: CRM: Move repo from /tmp to permanent location
tasks.description: Moved from /tmp/crm to projects/crm/ via fresh git clone. .env.local copied. npm installed.

tasks.title: Build 50-target investor sheet
tasks.description: 50 investors researched and added to Google Sheet with thesis alignment, check size, contact info.

tasks.title: Crunchbase competitor investor analysis
tasks.description: Pulled Crunchbase API investor data for 15 competitors. Cross-referenced against 477 target investors. Results: 212 Tier 1, 236 Tier 2, 8 Tier 3, 19 SKIP. Columns R+S filled on both investor sheet and competitive audit sheet.

tasks.title: Cross-reference competitor investors with target list
tasks.description: Identify which investors from our 50 targets also funded competitors. Prioritize warm intro paths.

tasks.title: Session continuity system
tasks.description: Active context files + history mining script + systemPrompt updates for all 8 topics. Verified working after gateway restart.

tasks.title: Investor portfolio checks - complete
tasks.description: Scraped Crunchbase API for 15 competitor investor lists. Cross-referenced against 383 target investors. 175 Tier 1, 184 Tier 2, 4 Tier 3, 18 SKIP. Columns R+S filled on investor sheet.

tasks.title: Email finding for Tier 1 investors
tasks.description: Find contact emails for 175 Tier 1 investors. Next step after portfolio checks.

tasks.title: LinkedIn network cross-reference
tasks.description: Waiting for Chris's LinkedIn data export (requested 2026-03-13). Cross-reference connections against 212 Tier 1 investor firms + portfolio companies to find warm intro paths.

tasks.title: Email + LinkedIn finding for 355 target investors
tasks.description: Find email addresses and LinkedIn profile URLs for 355 investors (check size 250K-4M filter). Use Brave search per investor.

tasks.title: CRM: Granola MCP sync with health monitoring
tasks.description: Build Granola sync cron that pulls meeting notes/summaries via MCP. Includes: token refresh, health checks, auto-alerting on failure, task creation when MCP is down.

tasks.title: CRM: Apollo.io integration for LinkedIn profile enrichment
tasks.description: Integrated PDL (People Data Labs) for structured LinkedIn work history with role dates + Apollo.io for org enrichment (employee count, funding, industry). Free tiers: PDL 100/mo, Apollo unlimited org lookups. Keys on Vercel: PDL_API_KEY, APOLLO_API_KEY.

tasks.title: Thesis research on 44 warm VC connections
tasks.description: Research thesis alignment for 44 VC connections from Chris's LinkedIn that aren't on the NFX investor list. Add strong fits to target sheet.

tasks.title: Pipeline audit: identify latent opportunities and set Monday follow-ups
tasks.description: Review all contact notes in the CRM. Find people Chris has met with once who are dormant/latent in the pipeline — hanging opportunities with no follow-up scheduled. For each one, set a follow-up deadline for Monday (2026-03-16). Requires querying the DB for contacts with meetings but no next_follow_up set.

tasks.title: Add create task UI to Mission Control
tasks.description: New Task button + modal in MC dashboard. POST endpoint added. Built and deployed.

tasks.title: Dripify integration: scrape campaign leads on new contact creation
tasks.description: When calendar sync creates a new contact, search Dripify campaign leads (via Playwright browser automation) for matching name. Pull LinkedIn URL, company, title from Dripify. Feed that into PDL enrichment for accurate pre-meeting data. Flow: calendar invite → contact created → Dripify scrape → PDL enrichment → pre-meeting brief. Needs: Chris's Dripify login credentials.

tasks.title: Document enrichment workflows in repo
tasks.description: Create a docs/enrichment.md (or similar) in the CRM repo documenting all enrichment data flows: 1) Calendar invite → auto-enrich (current), 2) Manual enrich button, 3) Post-meeting Granola re-enrichment (planned), 4) Dripify scrape → PDL pipeline (planned). Include data sources (PDL, Apollo, Brave, Dripify), what triggers each flow, what fields get populated, and the priority/fallback logic.

tasks.title: Story generation system prompt & creative brief
tasks.description: Design the Claude system prompt: character voice system, narrator personality, humor directives, writing rules. Test with 5+ stories.

tasks.title: Branching narrative data model
tasks.description: Scene graph data structure: scenes, choices, paths, convergence points, endings. JSON schema for a complete story.

tasks.title: Character voice & variety system
tasks.description: Rotating character archetypes, narrator personalities, humor seed system. Prevent repetitive generations.

tasks.title: Generate & evaluate 5 test stories
tasks.description: End-to-end story gen test. Evaluate: writing quality, character distinctiveness, humor, age-appropriateness, branching validity.

tasks.title: Character sheet generation pipeline
tasks.description: Automated pipeline: story characters → Nano Banana 2 character reference sheets. Style template with text/blur suppression.

tasks.title: Location background generation pipeline
tasks.description: Empty establishing shots per location. Fed as reference for scene composition. Flat illustration, no DoF, no blur.

tasks.title: Scene composition with reference anchoring
tasks.description: Multi-turn Nano Banana 2: location ref + character ref → composed scene. Camera angles, spatial anchoring.

tasks.title: Image validation & retry logic
tasks.description: Post-gen checks: no unwanted text, character consistency, no duplicate objects. Auto-retry on failure.

tasks.title: Choice card illustration generation
tasks.description: Small illustrated cards for each choice point. 512px. Visually distinct, self-explanatory.

tasks.title: Next.js project setup & Vercel deploy
tasks.description: Initialize Next.js + Tailwind, project structure, deploy to Vercel. Mobile-responsive base.

tasks.title: Story playback UI
tasks.description: Full-screen scenes with text overlay. Tap/swipe advance. Transitions. Speech bubbles for dialogue. Narrator styling.

tasks.title: Choice card UI & branching navigation
tasks.description: Illustrated choice cards at branches. Large tap targets, zero-literacy. Scene graph navigation. Back button.

tasks.title: Branding & UI design system
tasks.description: Kaboom Books identity: colors (red/yellow/black), typography, torn paper edges, doodle accents, app icon.

tasks.title: Loading / generation experience
tasks.description: Animated loading (~30 sec). Progress indicators. Funny messages. Transition to playback when Scene 1 ready.

tasks.title: Voice prompt input (Web Speech API)
tasks.description: Big mic button, Web Speech API transcription, send to story gen. No confirmation. Text input fallback.

tasks.title: Progressive generation pipeline (backend)
tasks.description: Orchestrate: structure → char sheets → Scene 1 (start playback) → remaining scenes in background. Stay 2-3 ahead.

tasks.title: Story library browser
tasks.description: Browse generated stories. Cover image, title, date. Tap to replay. Explore different paths.

tasks.description: Email/password or Google OAuth. Link stories to account. Basic profile (child name, age).

tasks.description: $9.99/month. Track story generation credits. Free tier: 1 story to try.

tasks.description: 5-10 stories across popular themes. Available to all users immediately.

tasks.title: User testing with target audience
tasks.description: Test with Chris's son + friends. Observe engagement, navigation. Iterate.

tasks.title: Performance optimization & bug fixes
tasks.description: Image loading, transitions, mobile responsiveness. Fix bugs from testing.

tasks.title: Kaboom Books: Fix image loading issues
tasks.description: 1. Chapter 2+ images timing out (30-40s loading then failing). First images work fine. Investigate why subsequent scene images are slow/broken. 2. Image placeholder needs opaque background so scrolling text doesn't show through during loading.

tasks.title: Fix topic auto-detection: check config not registry, auto-write config, notify for restart
tasks.description: Detection script checks registry markdown instead of openclaw.json config. Topics get memory files but no systemPrompt. Fix: check config, write config entries, message Chris for restart.

tasks.title: Fix scene generation failure (race condition + stale closures)
tasks.description: Critical: scenes lost due to Redis race condition in patchStory (no locking, parallel prefetches overwrite each other). Also stale React closure in handleChoice polling loop means prefetch results are never seen. Error recovery 'try again' button does nothing.

tasks.title: Fix illustration prompt character confusion
tasks.description: Illustration prompts confuse characters when character assets don't exist for all characters. Need to limit illustration prompts to characters with existing assets, or generate missing assets first.

tasks.title: Deploy Mission Control to Vercel with Postgres
tasks.description: Migrate MC from local JSON file to deployed app. Vercel Postgres for tasks (source of truth), topics/projects as synced mirror. Bearer token auth on all API routes. Rewrite tasks.sh CLI to call deployed API. GitHub repo for CI/CD.
